  Fix 1: "Disable deterministicKeys for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable deterministicKeys for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable deterministicKeys for entire file"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable deterministicKeys for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable deterministicKeys for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace 'Hello' with '@effect/test-app/test/MyClass'" ===

--- file:///.src/test.ts ---
// @effect-v3
// @effect-diagnostics deterministicKeys:error
import * as Persistable from "./utils"
import * as Context from "effect/Context"

// simple case inside same file
export function LocalConstructor(/** @effect-identifier */ identifier: string) {
  return Context.Tag("hey/" + identifier)
}

export class MyClass extends LocalConstructor("@effect/test-app/test/MyClass")<MyClass, {}>() {
}

// referenced on another file
export class TTLRequest extends Persistable.Class<{
  payload: { id: number }
}>()("TTLRequest", {
  primaryKey: (req) => `TTLRequest:${req.id}`
}) {}


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable deterministicKeys for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable deterministicKeys for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Replace 'TTLRequest' with '@effect/test-app/test/TTLRequest'" ===

--- file:///.src/test.ts ---
// @effect-v3
// @effect-diagnostics deterministicKeys:error
import * as Persistable from "./utils"
import * as Context from "effect/Context"

// simple case inside same file
export function LocalConstructor(/** @effect-identifier */ identifier: string) {
  return Context.Tag("hey/" + identifier)
}

export class MyClass extends LocalConstructor("Hello")<MyClass, {}>() {
}

// referenced on another file
export class TTLRequest extends Persistable.Class<{
  payload: { id: number }
}>()("@effect/test-app/test/TTLRequest", {
  primaryKey: (req) => `TTLRequest:${req.id}`
}) {}
